name: 稳定性测试任务集 - 多类型任务混合执行
description: 模拟真实开发流程：文件读取、代码修改、测试执行、文档生成、重构分析

tasks.label: 文件读取 - 提取 package.json 信息
tasks.prompt: Read the file backend/package.json and extract the 'name' and 'version' fields. Output them in the format: 'Project: <name>, Version: <version>'

tasks.label: 代码修改 - 创建 HealthCheckResponse DTO
代码修改 - 创建 HealthController
测试执行 - api-response 单元测试
tasks.prompt:
In the backend/ directory, run the following command and report the result:
npx jest src/common/dto/api-response.spec.ts --no-coverage --silent

Report whether the tests passed or failed, and how many tests were run.

tasks.label: 测试执行 - logger 单元测试
tasks.prompt:
In the backend/ directory, run the following command and report the result:
npx jest src/utils/logger.spec.ts --no-coverage --silent

Report whether the tests passed or failed, and how many tests were run.

tasks.label: 文档生成 - 项目概要
tasks.prompt:
Read backend/package.json and backend/README.md (if it exists). Generate a project summary in Markdown format that includes:
1. Project name and version (from package.json)
2. Description (from package.json or README)
3. Key dependencies (list the top 5 most important ones from dependencies and devDependencies)
4. Available scripts (list all npm scripts)

Output the Markdown content. If README.md doesn't exist, note that and use only package.json data.

tasks.label: 代码修改 - 创建 PaginationDto
重构任务 - DTO 模块分析
tasks.prompt:
Read all .ts files (excluding .spec.ts test files) in backend/src/common/dto/. For each file, list:
1. The file name
2. All exported classes/interfaces/types
3. A brief description of what the file provides (its purpose)

Format the output as a Markdown table with columns: File | Exports | Purpose
